item.title: About
item.description: I believe in Africa and I believe our ability to solve problems we encounter. My purpose is to use what I love, Bioinformatics, data and digital combined with right leadership to tackle challenges that will come. To begin to implement my believe, I’ve begin Abidjan R users in Abidjan, Ivory Coast since 2016. I’m now phD student in Bioinformatics / Biomolecules. You’ll find my sacademic achievement following my Google scholar link.
